title.en: State funding of maternity leave benefits in the private sector

summary.en: Shift the cost of maternity leave from employers to the state to remove hiring bias against women

title.si: පුද්ගලික අංශයේ මාතෘ නිවාඩු සඳහා රජයේ අරමුදල් සැපයීම

summary.si: කාන්තාවන්ට එරෙහිව පවතින බඳවා ගැනීමේ පක්ෂග්‍රාහීත්වය ඉවත් කිරීම සඳහා මාතෘ නිවාඩු සඳහා වැය වන පිරිවැය සේවා යෝජකයන්ගෙන් රජය වෙත මාරු කිරීම

title.en: Unknown
title.ta: தனியார் துறையில் மகப்பேறு விடுப்புக்கான செலவுகளை அரசு ஏற்று நடத்துதல்

summary.en: No summary available
summary.ta: பெண்களை பணியமர்த்துவதில் உள்ள பாரபட்சத்தை நீக்க, மகப்பேறு விடுப்புக்கான செலவை முதலாளிகளிடமிருந்து அரசுக்கு மாற்றுதல்

title.en: Removing taxation on Employees’ Provident Fund returns

summary.en: Sri Lanka's Employees' Provident Fund faces a regressive 14% tax on investment returns. Removing it restores fairness, protects its members and aligns with global practice

title.en: Unknown
title.si: සේවක අර්ථසාධක අරමුදල් ආපසු ගෙවීම් මත බදු ඉවත් කිරීම

summary.en: No summary available
summary.si: ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ සේවක අර්ථසාධක අරමුදල එහි ආයෝජන ප්‍රතිලාභ මත 14% ක ප්‍රතිගාමී බද්දකට මුහුණ දෙයි. එය ඉවත් කිරීම සාධාරණත්වය යළි තහවුරු කරයි, එහි සාමාජිකයන් ආරක්ෂා කරයි සහ ගෝලීය භාවිතාවන්ට අනුකූල වේ.

title.en: Unknown
title.ta: ஊழியர் சேமலாப நிதிய வருமானத்தின் மீதான வரி நீக்கம்

summary.en: No summary available
summary.ta: இலங்கையின் ஊழியர் சேமலாப நிதி, முதலீட்டு வருமானத்தில் 14% பின்னடைவு வரியை எதிர்கொள்கிறது. அதை நீக்குவது நியாயத்தை மீட்டெடுக்கிறது, அதன் உறுப்பினர்களைப் பாதுகாக்கிறது மற்றும் உலகளாவிய நடைமுறையுடன் ஒத்துப்போகிறது.

title.en: Unknown
title.si: පුද්ගලික සහභාගීත්වය සහ පරිසර කාර්මික උද්‍යාන හරහා ගුණාත්මක අපනයන සැකසුම් කලාප (EPZs)

summary.en: No summary available
summary.si: ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ අපනයන සැකසුම් කලාපවලට ධාරිතාවක් ඇත, නමුත් මූල්‍ය සීමාවන් නිසා රාජ්‍ය ව්‍යාප්තියට බාධා එල්ල වේ. ගුණාත්මක ආයෝජන ආකර්ෂණය කර ගැනීම සඳහා ශක්තිමත් නීති, ප්‍රමිති සහ අධීක්ෂණය සහිතව පුද්ගලික අංශය විසින් මෙහෙයවනු ලබන කලාප සක්‍රීය කිරීම අත්‍යවශ්‍ය වේ.

title.en: Quality Industrial Zones via Private Participation and Eco-Industrial Parks

summary.en: Sri Lanka's EPZs are capacity, but fiscal limits block public expansion. Enabling private-led zones with strong laws, standards, and oversight is vital to attract quality investment.

title.en: Unknown
title.ta: தனியார் பங்களிப்பு மற்றும் சூழல்-தொழில்துறை பூங்காக்கள் மூலம் தரமான ஏற்றுமதி செயலாக்க வலயங்கள் (EPZs)

summary.en: No summary available
summary.ta: இலங்கையின் ஏற்றுமதி செயலாக்க வலயங்கள் (EPZs) திறன் கொண்டவை, ஆனால் நிதி வரம்புகள் பொது விரிவாக்கத்தைத் தடுக்கின்றன. தரமான முதலீடுகளை ஈர்ப்பதற்கு, வலுவான சட்டங்கள், தரநிலைகள் மற்றும் மேற்பார்வையுடன் தனியார்-தலைமையிலான வலயங்களை இயக்குவது மிக அவசியம்

title.en: Replacing the Fixed Expenditure Cap with a Revenue-Based Rule

summary.en: The proposal replaces the current fixed spending limit with a flexible rule tied to revenue. This reform ensures that when Sri Lanka’s revenue grows, government spending can grow too.

title.en: Unknown
title.si: ආදායම් මත පදනම් වූ නීතියක් සමඟ වියදම් සීමාවන් වෙනස් කිරීම.

summary.en: No summary available
summary.si: ආදායමට අනුව නම්‍යශීලී රීතියක් හඳුන්වා දීමෙන් ස්ථාවර වියදම් සීමාවන් වෙනස් කිරීමට යෝජනා කරයි. මෙය ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ ආදායම වර්ධනය වන විට රජයේ වියදම් ද වැඩි කිරීමට ඉඩ සලසයි.

title.en: Unknown
title.ta: வருமான அடிப்படையிலான விதியைக் கொண்டு நிலையான செலவின உச்சவரம்பை மாற்றுதல்

summary.en: No summary available
summary.ta: தற்போதைய நிலையான செலவின உச்சவரம்பை வருமானத்துடன் இணைக்கப்பட்ட நெகிழ்வான விதியுடன் இந்த முன்மொழிவு மாற்றியமைக்கிறது. இலங்கையின் வருமானம் அதிகரிக்கும்போது, அரசாங்க செலவினமும் அதிகரிக்கும் என்பதை இந்த சீர்திருத்தம் உறுதி செய்கிறது.

title.en: Maintaining an updated, online, publicly accessible database of blacklisted companies.

summary.en: Sri Lanka addressed legal gap in procurement blacklisting, but compliance remains weak. Establishing a centralized, public online blacklist would strengthen enforcement, deter corruption, and align with regional standards.

title.en: Unknown
title.si: වැරදිකරු වූ සමාගම්වල යාවත්කාලීන දත්ත ගබඩාවක්.

summary.en: No summary available
summary.si: ප්‍රසම්පාදන කළු ලැයිස්තුගත කිරීමේ නෛතික අඩුපාඩු ශ්‍රී ලංකාව විසින් ආමන්ත්‍රණය කර ඇතත් අනුකූලතාව දුර්වලය. ඒකීය, ප්‍රසිද්ධ සබැඳි කළු ලැයිස්තුවක් ක්‍රියාත්මක කිරීම බලාත්මක කිරීම ශක්තිමත් කරයි, දූෂණය වළක්වයි, සහ කලාපීය ප්‍රමිතීන්ට අනුකූල වේ.

title.en: Unknown

summary.en: No summary available
summary.ta: கொள்வனவில் இலங்கையின் சட்ட இடைவெளியை இலங்கை நிவர்த்தி செய்துள்ள போதிலும், அதற்கான இணக்கம் பலவீனமாகவே உள்ளது. மத்தியப்படுத்தப்பட்ட, பொதுமக்களுக்கான இணையவழி கறுப்புப் பட்டியலை நிறுவுவது நடைமுறைப்படுத்தலை வலுப்படுத்தி, ஊழலைத் தடுத்து, பிராந்திய நியமங்களுக்கு அமைந்ததாக இருக்கும்.

title.en: Conduct a Forensic Audit of the EPF once in 5 years

summary.en: Legislative, regulatory, or policy measures should be established to mandate a forensic audit of the Employees’ Provident Fund (EPF) every five years. Regular audits will enhance accountability, increase transparency in managing workers’ retirement savings, and serve as a warning against potential misuse.

title.en: Enhancing Information Disclosure Requirements of the Employees Provident Fund (EPF)

summary.en: Proposal aims to increase the frequency and clarity of required disclosures by legally mandating the release of a monthly statement of investments and divestments and a monthly report showing the cumulative yield and the preceding 12-month yield of its securities portfolio.

title.en: Fast-Track Trade Facilitation to bridge the gap with Regional Competitors.

summary.en: Fast-track trade facilitation by implementing the WTO TFA, automating border agencies under a National Single Window, and acceding to the Madrid Protocol to strengthen exports.

title.en: Proposal for Establishing a Digital Beneficial Ownership Register

summary.en: Sri Lanka recently introduced an amendment to the Companies Act, requiring the public disclosure of Beneficial Ownership information. A Beneficial Owner is the human being who ultimately owns or controls a company. Establishing a digital, publicly accessible database of Beneficial Owners would help deter corruption, detect conflicts of interest, and strengthen asset recovery efforts.

title.en: Proposal for Piloting Model Elder Day Care Centers at Provincial Level

summary.en: This proposal recommends that the government pilot model elder day care centers, with at least one in each of the nine. This proposal would will address two key challenges that Sri Lanka is facing, (i) an ageing population coupled with limited options for support for families caring for elders, especially those with chronic disabilities, and (ii) the disproportionately high burden of care that falls on women within a household, with acts as a barrier to their freedom and economic empowerment. It also represents a meaningful step towards delivering on the Government’s manifesto pledge to establish elderly care centers at the divisional secretariat level.

title.en: Proposal for Budget Allocations to Reform Sri Lanka’s Mental Health Legislation and Services

summary.en: Proposal aims to strengthen mental health justice and inclusion in Sri Lanka by establishing dedicated budget lines for community psychiatry outreach, legal aid, and workforce development under the Ministry of Health, and by reforming the colonial-era Mental Diseases Ordinance into a rights-based Mental Health Act that ensures patient protections, community-based care, and independent review mechanisms.
